rulings.Case Title: DONALD RYAN VS. LINDA JENKINSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defts' Motion To Require Pltf To Furnish Security (Ccp 391.1); This Case Is Stayed Pursuant To Ccp 391.6; Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Defts' Motion To Require Pltf To Furnish Security
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, MARCH 20, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANTS LINDA JENKINSON, LES CONCIERGES INC., RHONDA MEYER, RAMESH PATEL, JOSEPH RUKUS, MIKE TRENARY, KAREN VAN PARIS AND TRISH WONG'S Motion To Require Plaintiff To Furnish Security (C.C.P. 391.1) Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Defendants' Motion To Require Plaintiff To Furnish Security IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED DISCOVERY ABUSES ARE TO BE ADDRESSED BY THE DISCOVERY COMMISSIONER AND IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE SOUGHT THIS REMEDY. THIS CASE IS BASED ON DIFFERENT PARTIES THAN WERE IN THE KOHLER AND TRIDENT CASES. ALTHOUGH THE COURT IS TROUBLED BY THE FACT THAT PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT ESTABLISHED, AS YET, THAT PLAINTIFF IS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT IN THIS CASE UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 391.1. =(302/PJM/KD)

THE CLAIMS RELATED TO DECKER'S WORK OVERLAP. =(302/PJM/PB)
